title: Sina Plot で 分布の密度と個々の値を同時に捉える
novelty_reason: バイオリン図の密度の幅に合わせてドットを散らす、ジッターとバイオリン図のハイブリッドです。
why_it_works: ジッタープロットより密度が正確に表現され、バイオリン図では見えない個々のデータポイントも表示されます。
how_to_read: 幅が広い高さほど、その値付近のデータ密度が高いことを示します。
点の位置で個々の観測値を確認できます。
分布の広がり方や偏り、外れ値の有無をグループ間で比較できます。
use_cases: 遺伝子解析結果の分布表示
各バッチの品質バラツキ比較
回答の正規性チェック
transform_js: var groups={};rawData.rows.forEach(function(r){var g=r.g!=null?r.g:r.group;var v=Number(r.v!=null?r.v:r.value);if(g==null||!isFinite(v))return;(groups[g]||(groups[g]=[])).push(v);});var cats=Object.keys(groups);function mean(a){var s=0;for(var i=0;i<a.length;i++)s+=a[i];return a.length?s/a.length:0;}function sd(a,m){var s=0;for(var i=0;i<a.length;i++){var d=a[i]-m;s+=d*d;}return a.length>1?Math.sqrt(s/(a.length-1)):1;}function kde(vals,x,bw){var s=0;for(var i=0;i<vals.length;i++){var u=(x-vals[i])/bw;s+=Math.exp(-0.5*u*u);}return s/(vals.length*bw*Math.sqrt(2*Math.PI));}var pointGroups=[];var shapes=[];var plotMin=Infinity,plotMax=-Infinity;cats.forEach(function(g,gi){var vals=groups[g].slice().sort(function(a,b){return a-b;});if(!vals.length)return;var m=mean(vals),sigma=sd(vals,m);if(!isFinite(sigma)||sigma<=0)sigma=Math.max((vals[vals.length-1]-vals[0])/6,0.2);var bw=Math.max(0.12,0.78*1.06*sigma*Math.pow(vals.length,-0.2));var isNonNegative=vals[0]>=0;var scanMin=isNonNegative?0:(vals[0]-3*bw);var scanMax=vals[vals.length-1]+3*bw;var scanSteps=260;var grid=[];var maxD=0;for(var s=0;s<=scanSteps;s++){var y=scanMin+(scanMax-scanMin)*(s/scanSteps);var d=kde(vals,y,bw);grid.push({y:y,d:d});if(d>maxD)maxD=d;}if(maxD<=0)maxD=1;var eps=0.025;var first=-1,last=-1;for(var i=0;i<grid.length;i++){if(grid[i].d/maxD>=eps){first=i;break;}}for(var i=grid.length-1;i>=0;i--){if(grid[i].d/maxD>=eps){last=i;break;}}if(first<0||last<0){first=0;last=grid.length-1;}var supportMin=grid[first].y;var supportMax=grid[last].y;if(isNonNegative&&supportMin<0)supportMin=0;plotMin=Math.min(plotMin,supportMin);plotMax=Math.max(plotMax,supportMax);var pts=[];vals.forEach(function(v,vi){var d=kde(vals,v,bw);var spread=0.42*(d/maxD);if(spread<0.03)spread=0.03;var seed=Math.sin((gi+1)*999+(vi+1)*777)*43758.5453123;var frac=seed-Math.floor(seed);var jitter=(frac-0.5)*2*spread;pts.push([gi+jitter,v,g]);});pointGroups.push({name:g,data:pts});var left=[[gi,supportMin]],right=[[gi,supportMin]];for(var i=first;i<=last;i++){var y=grid[i].y;if(y<supportMin||y>supportMax)continue;var w=0.42*(grid[i].d/maxD);left.push([gi-w,y]);right.push([gi+w,y]);}left.push([gi,supportMax]);right.push([gi,supportMax]);var poly=left.concat(right.reverse());poly.push(left[0]);shapes.push({name:g,poly:poly});});if(!isFinite(plotMin)||!isFinite(plotMax)){plotMin=0;plotMax=1;}var pad=(plotMax-plotMin)*0.06||0.5;transformedData={cats:cats,pointGroups:pointGroups,shapes:shapes,xMin:-0.6,xMax:Math.max(cats.length-0.4,0.6),yMin:plotMin-pad,yMax:plotMax+pad};
